name: plinth
description: Typed product data for AI agents. Resolves a product URL, GTIN barcode, or fuzzy name into a typed product object with per-field confidence, a price band, source method, and per-call cost.

auth.description: Create a key at https://onplinth.io in the dashboard. Required for tools/call unless paying per call over x402.
Per-call payment. tools/call returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements when no valid key or X-PAYMENT header is presented. Testnet only, no mainnet settlement yet.

tools.name: read_product
tools.description: Resolve a product URL or GTIN into a typed Schema.org Product object with per-field and overall confidence, a price band, source method, and the per-call cost.

tools.name: resolve_product
tools.description: Resolve a fuzzy product name into a typed product object via neural search then extraction, returned in the same call.

rest_api.note: compare_products and brief_product are available over REST only, not yet on the MCP tool list.

pricing.free_tier: 1000 trusted reads per month, no card, hard stop
